name: Gross Profit
formula_symbolic: Gross Profit = Total Revenue − Total COGS

name: Total Operating Expenses
formula_symbolic: Total Operating Expenses = Σ(Operating Expenses Accounts)

name: Operating Income
formula_symbolic: Operating Income = Gross Profit − Total Operating Expenses

name: Total Other Income/Expenses
formula_symbolic: Total Other Income/Expenses = Σ(Other Income/Expense Accounts)

name: Income Before Tax
formula_symbolic: Income Before Tax = Operating Income + Total Other Income/Expenses

name: Net Income
formula_symbolic: Net Income = Income Before Tax − Income Tax Expense
